assets.abstract: There is a convergence between cognitive models of imitation, constructs derived from social psychology studies on mimicry and empathy, and recent empirical findings from the neurosciences. The ideomotor framework of human actions assumes a common representational format for action and perception that facilitates imitation. Furthermore, the associative sequence learning model of imitation proposes that experience-based Hebbian learning forms links between sensory processing of the actions of oth

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Social Incarnation — intersubjectivity, embodied empathy, social predictive processing, second-person neuroscience.
